itemReviewed.name: City International School - Anand Nagar,Andheri West

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Subject: Concerns Regarding Principal's Conduct

Dear City International School,

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to express my deep concern about an issue I have observed regarding the conduct of the school principal, particularly in interactions with parents who may not be proficient in English.

It has come to my attention that parents, who may not have a high level of education or fluency in English, have reported feeling insulted and disrespected during their interactions with the principal. As a key representative of the school, such behavior raises serious questions about the adherence to principles of courtesy, understanding, and inclusivity.

It is essential that our educational institution embodies values not only in the curriculum but also in the conduct of its staff. If the principal, as a figurehead, does not demonstrate respectful communication, it raises concerns about the example set for both faculty and students.

I kindly request that appropriate measures be taken to address this matter, ensuring that all members of the school community, regardless of their background, are treated with dignity and respect.

Thank you for your attention to this important issue.

itemReviewed.name: City International School - Anand Nagar,Andheri West

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Worst experience ever
after filling admission forms our documents issue were already discussed "Staff" said its ok all we can do later after 3 months follow up we went to review the admission procedure we were told not being sorry but yes proudly Ms.Principal says you can come after 6 months Nursery is not important i mean vow madam
I requested alot that just because of fathers document issue you cannot spoil whole year of a child i had come specially for admission from abroad they dont value your time made me call child for interaction later making us stand outside the gate with child telling to get the documents first i mean you were sleeping from last 2 months
Not allowing to meet principal
Later when meeting the staff is just shaking head like a animal
Staff has so much attitude arrogant in talking to students i have seen live example
Please understand nd review first then make your decisions
